title: pilosella × cinerea subsp. tephraea
intro: Pilosella × cinerea subsp. tephraea is a rare, sterile hybrid species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, resulting from the cross between Pilosella cinerea and Pilosella tephraea. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella × cinerea subsp. tephraea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's extracts in ointments and salves for topical application.
